name: @quoin/tokens-lightning
description: Salesforce Lightning Design System palette translated onto the Quoin canonical semantic-token namespace.

attribution.harvestNotes: Salesforce SLDS palette extracted from salesforce-ux/design-system design-tokens/aliases/color-palettes.yml. Extraction method: A. Mapping: SLDS cool-gray + warm-gray + blue/green/red/orange/yellow ramps (steps 1-13). Default accent = BLUE_4 (Salesforce brand).
